description: Fragment of a business letter, probably sent from Qūṣ (between lines 1 and 2). Mentions "the 8th of Shawwāl, which is Shevat"; the writer's preoccupation on behalf of the recipient's illness; al-Shaykh ʿAllān; a rubāʿī (quarter-dinar?).
tags: to edit, illness letter 969-1517, Illness, Qus, illness: mention
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מקוס. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
